title: 舌戦開幕！賛美の湯 4話 酔いどれパーティー

script.text: お酒を飲みましょう！！

translations.en: Let's have some drinks!!

script.text: みんなで仲良くするなら、これがなきゃ始まらないわ！

translations.en: If we want to get along‚ we can't do without this!

script.text: 飲み会……？

translations.en: A drinking party…?

script.text: 私達と、貴方達で？

translations.en: With us and you?

script.text: さっそく売店で買ってこなくっちゃ

translations.en: Let's go buy it at the store right away!

script.text: あ、芽衣ちゃんは未成年だからジュースね！！

translations.en: Oh‚ Mei-chan is still a minor‚ so she'll have juice!!

script.text: わーい！　芽衣、グレープフルーツジュース飲みたい！

translations.en: Yay! Mea wants grapefruit juice!

script.text: スリクスさん達も、いっぱいお喋りしようね！

translations.en: Let's chat a lot with the IIIX girls too!

script.text: ほらぁ～、もっと飲まないと～

translations.en: Come on‚ let's drink more~

script.text: まだ缶が一つも空かないってどういうこと～？

translations.en: How come not a single can is empty yet? What's up with that~?

script.text: kanaさん、遙子と同い年なんでしょ～？

translations.en: Kana-san‚ you're the same age as Haruko-chan‚ right~?

script.text: だったらもっと沢山飲めるでしょぉ～～？

translations.en: Then you should be able to drink more~?

script.text: こいつ、酒癖悪っ！　それに酔うの早！！

translations.en:
This one here‚ she can't handle her alcohol!
And she gets drunk quickly!!

script.text: あなたがさっき、歳がどうとか、からかうから……

translations.en: You were the one teasing about age earlier…

script.text: ……まさか、こんなことで

translations.en: …I never thought

script.text: 初めて三人一緒にお酒を飲むとは思わなかったわね

translations.en: we'd be drinking together like this for the first time.

script.text: あんた達は、前に野外イベントあった時に

translations.en: You two were probably drinking alone during

script.text: 二人だけで飲んでたんでしょ

translations.en: that outdoor event before.

script.text: mihoが逃げるから

translations.en: Miho always runs away‚

script.text: kanaだけ、さくらの面倒見させられてさ～

translations.en: so I'm left to take care of Sakura~

script.text: あれはなりゆきよ、なりゆき

translations.en: That was just how it happened.

script.text: それに、あなただって面白がってたじゃないの

translations.en: Besides‚ you seemed to enjoy it too.

script.text: ほら～、mihoさんも飲め飲めぇ～

translations.en: Come on‚ Miho-san‚ drink up~!

script.text: 遙子のぉ、お酒がぁ、飲めないって言うのかぁ～！

translations.en: Are you saying that Haruko can't handle her alcohol~?

script.text: 私達、明日もツアーの仕事があるから

translations.en: We have a tour job tomorrow‚

script.text: 今日は飲まずに早めに休みたいのだけど……

translations.en: so I want to rest early without drinking today…

script.text: 遙子、mihoさんとはお話ししてみたくてぇ～

translations.en: Haruko wants to talk with Miho-san~

script.text: ほらぁ、グループの中で一番年上でしょぉ～？

translations.en: After all‚ Haruko is the oldest in the group‚ right~?

script.text: どうやったら、みんなをまとめられるのかぁ～、とか

translations.en: How can I unite everyone‚

script.text: しぇんぱいの、心構え！！　とか～

translations.en: and what's the mindset of a senpai!!~

script.text: ……分かったわよ、少しだけ付き合うわ

translations.en: …Alright‚ I'll accompany you for a little while.

script.text: おお、煙たがってたくせにmihoに絡んでる

translations.en:
Oh‚ you were acting all annoyed‚
but now you're bothering Miho.

script.text: いや～、酒の力って凄いね～

translations.en: Heh‚ the power of alcohol is amazing‚ isn't it?

script.text: どうでもいいけど。私、mihoのこと先輩とか

translations.en:
I don't care. I've never thought of Miho as a senior
or anything

script.text: 思ったこと一度もないから、聞いても無駄だと思うわよ

translations.en: so I think it's pointless to ask.

script.text: どうせぇ、スリクスさんに私の苦労は分からないのよぉ

translations.en: Anyway‚ Suzumura-san‚ you'll never understand my struggles.

script.text: 私なんてぇ、デビューしても何年も売れなくてぇ～

translations.en: I struggled for years even after my debut…

script.text: サニピに入って、やっと売れてぇ

translations.en:
It was only after joining Sunny Peace
that I finally started getting popular.

script.text: でも、み～んな私より年下で、キラキラしててぇ……

translations.en: But everyone is younger than me and so bright and shiny…

script.text: ……その愚痴はfranとkanaに言ってほしいわ

translations.en: …You can complain like that to Fran and Kana.

script.text: 私にだって、それなりに下積み時代はあったんだから

translations.en: I had my own share of hard times before.

script.text: だってぇ、franさん怖いんだも～ん

translations.en: But‚ you know‚ Fran-san is kinda scary.

script.text: ……絡まれるよりマシだけど

translations.en: …It's better than being pestered‚

script.text: それはそれで腹立つわね

translations.en: I guess‚ but it's still annoying.

script.text: ほらぁ、ね～、franさん怖いでしゅよねぇ～～

translations.en: See‚ Fran-san is scary‚ right? Right~?

script.text: あはは！　お酒って面白いな～！

translations.en: Ahaha! Alcohol is so interesting!

script.text: 酔っ払うと、こんな感じになっちゃうんだね

translations.en: When you're drunk‚ you end up like this‚ huh?

script.text: ねぇねぇmihoしゃん、遙子。どうしたらいいかしら

translations.en:
Hey hey‚ Miho-san‚ Haruko. How can I become more…
you know‚ sophisticated?

script.text: もっとぉ、キリッ！　とした感じになりたいの～

translations.en: I want to be more… sharp!~"
…Just be quiet.

script.text: なぁに～？　よく聞こえなかったの～

translations.en: Whaat? I couldn't hear you~.

script.text: 話を聞いていれば、さっきからウジウジと！！

translations.en:
If you were listening to the conversation‚
you've been acting all timid since earlier!!

script.text: ええい貴様、話し掛けられた時以外、口を開くな！！

translations.en: Hey‚ you! Don't you dare speak unless spoken to!!

script.text: 大体！　そこの大馬鹿どもが

translations.en: Seriously! You idiots over there have gone too far

script.text: 私を先輩と思っているなどと、目が節穴にも程がある！

translations.en: by thinking of me as your senior!

script.text: うわっ！？

translations.en: Whoa!?

script.text: 自覚あったんだ

translations.en: She was aware of it.

script.text: って言うか、自分で言っちゃうんだ……

translations.en: Or rather‚ she's saying it herself…

script.text: そこのkanaは！　何度注意しても食っちゃ寝の

translations.en:
And you there‚ Kana! No matter how many times
I warn you‚ you're always eating and sleeping‚

script.text: 節制心の欠片もない、まさしく豚そのものであり！！

translations.en: completely lacking self-control! You're like a pig!!

script.text: 横のfranは！　借金持ちのくせにまだ

translations.en: And you‚ Fran! Despite being in debt‚

script.text: 怪しげな金儲けの話に騙されかかるトリ頭である！！

translations.en:
you're still falling for shady money-making
schemes like a total sucker!!

script.text: ぶ、豚ぁ！？

translations.en: A‚ a pig!?

script.text: うわ～ん、そんなにぃ、怒らなくてもいいじゃない

translations.en: Uwaa‚ there's no need to get that angry~

script.text: 仲良くしましょうよぅ～

translations.en: Let's all get along~

script.text: 楽屋を出る時、ゴミを片付けるのはいつも私！！

translations.en:
Every time we leave the dressing room‚
it's always me who cleans up the trash!

script.text: 立つ鳥跡を濁さずという言葉も知らないのか！！

translations.en:
Don't you know the saying‚
"Don't foul the nest you're about to leave"!?

script.text: リハで一回ミスったのを、三ヶ月以上もネタにする！

translations.en:
And you‚ who keep making fun of the mistake
I made in rehearsal over three months ago‚

script.text: 人の心を持たない、貴様らはウジ虫だあああ！！

translations.en: heartless creatures‚ you're all maggots!!

script.text: うげ、いつの間にmihoあんなに飲んでたのよ

translations.en: Ugh‚ when did Miho start drinking so much?

script.text: あいつ、こんな面倒な酒癖だったの！？

translations.en: Is she always this troublesome when she's drunk!?

script.text: 大体、練習に真面目に取り組んだことがない！！

translations.en:
And to top it off‚ none of you have ever
seriously worked on improving your skills!!

script.text: 本番で失敗しないから、なおさら腹が立つ！！

translations.en:
You never fail during live performances‚
which makes me even more furious!!

script.text: ちょっと、fran

translations.en: Hey‚ Fran‚

script.text: あんたmihoのやつ止めてきてよ！！

translations.en: Go stop Miho!!

script.text: んー……

translations.en: Hm…

script.text: なあに、みんな賑やかにしてるわねー…………

translations.en: What's the matter? Everyone's having fun…

script.text: ああもう、こいつはこいつで寝落ちしかけてるし！

translations.en: Ugh‚ and this one here is about to fall asleep!

script.text: お酒って、危険なんだね……

translations.en: Alcohol can be dangerous‚ huh…

script.text: 芽衣も気を付けようっと

translations.en: I'll be careful too.

script.text: そうしてちょうだい

translations.en: Please do.

script.text: あんたは将来、あんなアホな大人になったらダメだよ

translations.en: You shouldn't become such a foolish adult in the future.

script.text: そういえば、kanaちゃんは酔ってないの？

translations.en: By the way‚ Kana-chan‚ aren't you drunk?

script.text: ふん、kanaがあんな安酒で酔える訳ないでしょ

translations.en: Hmph‚ there's no way I'd get drunk on such cheap booze.

script.text: ……ほら、fran、眠いならさっさと部屋戻りなよ

translations.en: …Hey‚ Fran‚ if you're sleepy‚ just go back to the room.

script.text: うん、私、部屋に帰るー……

translations.en: Yeah‚ I'm heading back to the room…

script.text: ……きゃぁっ！？　お水こぼしちゃった！

translations.en: Oops! I spilled water!

script.text: げっ、テメェ何してくれてんだこれ！？

translations.en: What the heck are you doing!? My clothes are soaking wet!

script.text: kanaの服がずぶ濡れじゃんか！

translations.en: You've got to be kidding me!

script.text: んー……、ごめんなさ……

translations.en: Ugh… I'm sorry…

script.text: kanaは未だにピーマン食べられないくせに～！！

translations.en: Even though Kana still can't eat bell peppers!!

script.text: ああもううるさい、miho！

translations.en: Ugh‚ you're so annoying‚ Miho!

script.text: この枕でも食らって、ちょっと黙ってろ！！

translations.en: Take this pillow‚ just be quiet for a bit!!

script.text: …………きゅぅ

translations.en: …Kyu…

script.text: ……あ、ヤバ、franに枕当てちゃった

translations.en: Uh-oh‚ I accidentally hit Fran with the pillow.

script.text: え、枕投げするの？

translations.en: Huh‚ you're throwing pillows?

script.text: 芽衣もやるやる、えーい！！

translations.en: Me too‚ me too! Here goes! Ei!

script.text: んふふ～、芽衣しゃん、やったなぁ～～！

translations.en: Hehe‚ good job‚ Mea-chan!

script.text: 遙子も、遙子も、負けにゃいからねぇ～～

translations.en: Harukos will show you‚ too‚ I won't lose~!

script.text: やかましい！！

translations.en: Shut up!!

script.text: まずは社会人の心構えを覚えろ、全員正座ァ！！

translations.en: First‚ learn the attitude of an adult. Everyone‚ sit properly!!

script.text: あんたが一番、声がでかいんだって！

translations.en: You're the one with the loudest voice here!
